title: E-Commerce Platform
description: Built a full-featured e-commerce platform with product catalog, cart, checkout, and payment integration. Implemented server-side rendering for SEO optimization and real-time inventory tracking.
highlights: Reduced page load times by 40% through SSR and image optimization
Implemented real-time inventory management with WebSocket updates
Achieved 98% test coverage across critical user flows

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Developed an interactive analytics dashboard for business intelligence, featuring custom chart components, data filtering, and CSV export functionality.
highlights: Designed reusable chart component library used across 3 products
Reduced report generation time from minutes to seconds

title: CI/CD Pipeline Automation
description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive CI/CD pipeline using GitHub Actions and Docker, enabling automated testing, building, and deployment across multiple environments.
highlights: Reduced deployment time from 45 minutes to 8 minutes
Achieved zero-downtime deployments with blue-green strategy

title: Microservices Migration
description: Led the migration of a monolithic application to a microservices architecture, improving scalability and team autonomy across 4 delivery squads.
highlights: Improved system scalability to handle 5x traffic increase
Established API contracts and shared library ecosystem
